title: OptimizationSessionListResponseDTO
description: Response of GET /api/v1/sessions (list optimization sessions). Returns the caller-visible sessions and a count. Each entry is a lightweight summary (identity + lifecycle state + progress) used by the SDK to enumerate sessions and clean up orphaned/zombie 'running' sessions from the client. Forward-compatible: each summary carries at least session_id and status; the server may add fields (additionalProperties allowed), so consumers must ignore unknown keys rather than fail. Optional query params on the request are pattern (match session ids) and status (lifecycle filter).

sessions.description: Caller-visible session summaries (scoped server-side by the authenticated principal; never client-supplied tenant).

total.description: Number of sessions in this response (len(sessions)).

status.description: Lifecycle state of the session (e.g. active / running / completed / failed). Free-form string so the SDK tolerates new server states without a schema bump.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 creation timestamp when the server provides one.
